title: From Zero to Your First Agentic AI Workflow in 26 Minutes (Claude Code)

extracted.hook: Aentic workflows are changing how we build AI automations, but not only that, they're also changing the entire industry with more businesses investing in Aentic AI to improve their workflows.

slow: "So, that's why in this video, I'll be telling you everything you need to know, and then I'm going to show you how to build your first agentic workflow from absolutely zero."
